caption: The video appears to be a static image of a promotional graphic for "The Weird Circle," a radio program. The image features a man in a white shirt and bow tie, with a distressed expression, as if he is being restrained or attacked by ghostly figures. These figures have skeletal hands and are positioned around him, creating a sense of urgency and fear. The title "The Weird Circle" is prominently displayed in bold red letters, with the words "Radio Program" written below it. The overall design suggests a theme of mystery, horror, or supernatural elements, likely reflecting the content of the radio show. There is no visible movement or change in the frames provided, indicating that this might be an introductory or closing screen for the program.
